name: Rene
passiveDesc: Rene gains 0.01% Energy Regen for every 100 Physical ATK.
rTalentDesc: Rene's Normal and Charged Attacks generate 1 Flux

talent1.name: Intelligence Network
talent1.desc:
Certain skills of Intelligence-Type characters can hijack the opponent, applying 1 stack of Hijacked, max 20 stacks.
Hijacked: Increases the Focus build-up rate of the affected opponent by 2%.

normalAttackDesc: Rene deals 14 (+36.2% Physical ATK) as Artificial DMG.
chargedAttackDesc:
Rene deals 28 (+44% Physical ATK) as Artificial DMG.

If Rene has 3 stacks of Absolute, Weeping Sorrow will apply the opponent with 3 stacks of Hijacked.
normalSkillDesc: Rene launches a Projectile of Knowledge at the selected opponent, dealing 133 (+47.6% Physical ATK) as Artificial DMG. Rene gains 1 stack of Absolute when Projectile of Knowledge deals DMG to an opponent.
riftedSkillDesc: Rene launches it's Payback Modules at each opponent, dealing 116 (+33.6% Physical ATK) as Artificial DMG. If Payback Modueles deal DMG to an opponent, Rene gains 2 stacks of Absolute and all team members gain 60 Knowledge Unit.
fragment1Desc: When Rene casts Rifted Skill "Payback Modules", all team members gains 12 Knowledge Unit for every 500 Physical ATK Rene has. Additionally, when Rene casts Charged Attack "Weeping Sorrow" with 3 stacks of Absolute, all team members gain an extra 12 Knowledge Unit for every 1000 Physical ATK Rene has.
fragment2Desc: When Rene Rifted Skill "Payback Modules" hits an opponent, Rene gains 1 additional stack of Absolute. Additionally, Rene can gain Absolute stacks by hitting the opponents instead of needing to deal DMG to them.
fragment4Desc: When Rene Rifted Skill "Payback Modules" hits an opponent, Rene gains 20 Surge. This effect can occur once every 3 Cycles.
fragment5Desc: "Projectile of Knowledge" level is increased by 3.
fragment6Desc: When Rene cast Rifted Skill "Payback Modules", all team members gains 20% CRIT DMG and 20% Artificial DMG Bonus for 3 Cycles.
